column2: coming of age movies i actually admire
column5:
perfection. not performatism. these are some movies where they actually capture the feeling of a human who is going through the "coming of age" phase and how they do so?? by simply  not fabricating the core emotion of teens. whoever fucking directed "edging" of 17 take notes.



So i ask you a question what is "comg of age". To me coming of age is just finally noticing yourself. Figuring out where you actually stand in this wilddd world. You start seeing how temporary everything is and how easily it can all fall apart including you yup took me soo long to figure it out. And from that weird mix of fear and clarity you suddenly realize you still get to choose who you are and what you do because nothing is fully decided yet. I never really fully experienced the last part yeah feel free to share your thoughts.
